channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former Minister T. Jeevan Reddy to officially join BRS by April 20
item.description: Senior politician and former Minister T. Jeevan Reddy, who recently resigned from the Congress party, is set to formally join the Bharat Rashtra Samithi (BRS) by April 20, 2026. Mr. Jeevan Reddy met B...

item.title: FIFA World Cup Trophy Begins Canadian Tour with Vancouver Display
item.description: The FIFA World Cup trophy made its first Canadian stop in Vancouver, marking the start of a nationwide tour ahead of this summer's tournament. The event, held at the Vancouver Art Gallery, featured fo...

item.title: US Selective Service System to Automatically Register Eligible Men for the Military
item.description: The United States is set to abandon its decades-old requirement for men to register themselves for the draft. Instead, the government will automatically register eligible men aged 18 to 25, using info...

item.title: UN Diplomat Resigns, Claims Possible Nuclear Threat Against Iran
item.description: A Lebanese diplomat affiliated with the United Nations, Mohamad Safa, resigned publicly, alleging that some UN members are preparing for potential nuclear action against Iran. Safa framed his resignat...

item.title: Trump issues final ultimatum for Iran to strike peace deal or face military escalation
item.description: Donald Trump has warned Iran that it must strike a peace deal within 24 hours or face the end of the ceasefire and the launch of new military strikes. This stark ultimatum comes as the US leads delica...

item.title: Police Investigate Mysterious Death of Student Naomi Chebet in Nairobi Apartment
item.description: The Nation Africa story dives deep into the heartbreaking death of 20-year-old university student Naomi Chebet, whose lifeless body was found on a couch at a Nairobi apartment under unclear circumstan...

item.title: Economic Challenges Persist Amid Mideast Ceasefire and Fiscal Pressures
item.description: The recent temporary ceasefire in the Middle East brought initial optimism to global markets, with oil prices dipping and stocks rising. However, the situation remains fragile. U.S. President Donald T...

item.title: The Alibi: Walter's Scheme Revealed in Stella's Imprisonment
item.description: In the latest episode of 'The Alibi,' viewers witnessed a significant twist as it was revealed that Walter intentionally arranged for Stella's imprisonment. The episode, published on April 11, 2026, b...

item.title: Prince Harry faces libel claim from Sentebale following statements over charity governance
item.description: According to publicly available information and court filings reported by several media outlets, Prince Harry has reportedly become the subject of a libel lawsuit brought by Sentebale, the charity he ...

item.title: Ex-Lawmaker Ado Sani Kiri Officially Quits APC in Jigawa State
item.description: Ado Sani Kiri, wey be former member of House of Representatives and one of di pioneer chairmen of APC for Jigawa State, don officially resign him membership for di ruling All Progressives Congress (AP...

item.title: PNP Collaborates with DSWD to Avoid Overcrowding in Youth Shelters
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) is working with the Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) to prevent overcrowding in youth shelters as minors are being apprehended for violating cur...

item.title: Kamala Harris Indicates She Is Considering a 2028 Presidential Run
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris has provided the clearest indication yet that she may seek the Democratic nomination for president in 2028. During a conversation with Al Sharpton at the National A...

item.title: Atiku Criticises Tinubu Administration Over Rising Poverty in Nigeria
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar don express serious wahala over the World Bank report wey show say poverty dey increase sharply for Nigeria under President Bola Ahmed Tinubu. According to Atiku, ...

item.title: Criss Cross rebounds with straight-set win over Alpha Insurance in Spikers' Turf
item.description: The Criss Cross King Crunchers made a strong comeback in the Spikers’ Turf tournament by sweeping the Alpha Insurance squad in straight sets. This victory served as a quick recovery for Criss Cross af...

item.title: Understanding Water, Nutrition, and Daily Life for Artemis II Astronauts Before Returning to Earth
item.description: CNN’s Dr. Sanjay Gupta reports on how NASA’s Artemis II astronauts manage fundamental human needs such as water, nutrition, and rest during their mission as they prepare to return to Earth. The segmen...

item.title: Kylian Mbappé Targets Second World Cup Victory in 2026
item.description: Kylian Mbappé, the French football superstar, is preparing for the 2026 World Cup with renewed determination. Having won his first Fifa World Cup at just 19 in Russia 2018, he narrowly missed out on v...

item.title: Ten Indian Nationals Charged in the US for Staged Robbery Visa Fraud Case
item.description: Ten Indian nationals have been formally indicted by a US federal grand jury in Boston for allegedly staging armed robberies at various convenience stores across states like Massachusetts, Kentucky, an...

item.title: Alberta gun owners wait for compensation amid federal buyback dispute
item.description: More than 7,000 banned firearms have been declared in Alberta under the federal government’s Assault‑Style Firearms Compensation Program, yet owners in the province cannot yet receive payment because ...

item.title: Charity Sentebale takes legal action against Prince Harry over alleged defamatory media statements
item.description: Sentebale, a charity co-founded by Prince Harry and Prince Seeiso, has filed a defamation lawsuit against the Duke of Sussex and former trustee Mark Dyer. The charity, which supports young people in B...

item.title: Bilawal urges US-Iran talks in Islamabad to secure lasting peace
item.description: Former Foreign Minister and PPP Chairman Bilawal Bhutto Zardari highlighted the urgency of the ongoing US-Iran negotiations, stressing that the world does not have an alternative plan if these talks f...
